---
title: "Flow Gating Workflow"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "./")
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# Goal

This document runs the gating workflow across every FCS file found under
`data/`. The expensive `gs` object is cached under `processed_data/` and reused
on later renders when it already exists.

```{r load-js, results='asis'}
cat('<script src="https://unpkg.com/panzoom@9.4.0/dist/panzoom.min.js"></script>')
```

```{r libraries}
library(flowCore)
library(flowWorkspace)
library(PeacoQC)
library(MASS)
library(ggcyto)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r config}
path_to_fcs <- "data"
processed_dir <- "processed_data"
gs_cache_path <- file.path(processed_dir, "gating_gs")
figure_dir <- "figure"
reuse_existing_figures <- TRUE
force_rebuild_figures <- FALSE
plot_paths <- list(
  fsc_ssc = file.path(figure_dir, "fsc-ssc-plots-1.png"),
  dna_scatter = file.path(figure_dir, "dna-scatter-plots-1.png"),
  dna_density = file.path(figure_dir, "dna-density-plots-1.png")
)

dir.create(processed_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(figure_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
stopifnot(dir.exists(path_to_fcs))

flow_files <- list.files(
  path_to_fcs,
  pattern = "\\.fcs$",
  full.names = TRUE,
  recursive = TRUE
)
flow_files <- sort(normalizePath(flow_files, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))

stopifnot(length(flow_files) > 0)

chs <- c(
  "FSC-A", "FSC-H", "FSC-W",
  "SSC-A", "SSC-H", "SSC-W",
  "450-Violet C-A", "450-Violet C-H"
)
dna_ch <- c("450-Violet C-A", "450-Violet C-H")
dna_cofactor <- 500
```

# Inputs

```{r inputs}
input_tbl <- tibble(
  sample_name = basename(flow_files),
  source_path = flow_files
)
```

# Helper Functions

```{r helpers}
first_flowFrame <- function(x) {
  if (inherits(x, "flowFrame")) return(x)
  if (is.list(x)) {
    hits <- which(vapply(x, function(z) inherits(z, "flowFrame"), logical(1)))
    if (length(hits) > 0) return(x[[hits[1]]])
  }
  stop("Could not find a flowFrame in RemoveMargins output.")
}

dna_singlet_vec <- function(ff, a = "450-Violet C-A", h = "450-Violet C-H", nmads = 4) {
  xy <- exprs(ff)[, c(a, h), drop = FALSE]
  ok <- is.finite(xy[, 1]) & is.finite(xy[, 2]) & xy[, 1] > 0 & xy[, 2] > 0

  if (sum(ok) < 100) {
    return(rep(FALSE, nrow(xy)))
  }

  fit <- MASS::rlm(xy[ok, 2] ~ xy[ok, 1])
  pred <- coef(fit)[1] + coef(fit)[2] * xy[ok, 1]
  res <- xy[ok, 2] - pred

  spread <- mad(res, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(spread) || spread == 0) {
    spread <- sd(res, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  if (!is.finite(spread) || spread == 0) {
    spread <- 1e-8
  }

  keep_ok <- abs(res - median(res, na.rm = TRUE)) <= nmads * spread
  keep <- rep(FALSE, nrow(xy))
  keep[which(ok)[keep_ok]] <- TRUE
  keep
}

find_density_peaks <- function(x, bw = "nrd0") {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) < 2) {
    return(data.frame(x = numeric(0), y = numeric(0)))
  }

  d <- density(x, bw = bw)
  idx <- which(diff(sign(diff(d$y))) == -2) + 1L
  data.frame(x = d$x[idx], y = d$y[idx])
}

process_masks <- function(ff_raw, qc_channels, dna_channels, IT_limit = 0.65, dna_cofactor = 500, nmads = 4) {
  idx <- match(qc_channels, colnames(ff_raw))
  idx <- idx[!is.na(idx)]

  mr <- RemoveMargins(ff_raw, channels = idx, output = "full")
  ff_margin_raw <- first_flowFrame(mr)

  orig_id_margin <- as.integer(exprs(ff_margin_raw)[, "Original_ID"])
  margin_keep_global <- rep(FALSE, nrow(ff_raw))
  margin_keep_global[orig_id_margin] <- TRUE

  use_dna <- intersect(dna_channels, colnames(ff_margin_raw))
  if (length(use_dna) > 0) {
    tf <- transformList(use_dna, arcsinhTransform(a = 0, b = 1 / dna_cofactor, c = 0))
    ff_margin_proc <- transform(ff_margin_raw, tf)
  } else {
    ff_margin_proc <- ff_margin_raw
  }

  pq <- PeacoQC(
    ff = ff_margin_proc,
    channels = idx,
    determine_good_cells = "all",
    save_fcs = FALSE,
    plot = FALSE,
    report = FALSE,
    IT_limit = IT_limit
  )
  peacoqc_keep_local <- pq$GoodCells
  ff_peacoqc <- pq$FinalFF

  dna_keep_local <- dna_singlet_vec(
    ff_peacoqc,
    a = dna_channels[1],
    h = dna_channels[2],
    nmads = nmads
  )

  list(
    margin_keep = margin_keep_global,
    peacoqc_keep = peacoqc_keep_local,
    dna_keep = dna_keep_local
  )
}

build_gs <- function(flow_files, qc_channels, dna_channels, dna_cofactor = 500) {
  fs <- read.flowSet(
    files = flow_files,
    transformation = FALSE,
    truncate_max_range = FALSE
  )

  mask_list <- lapply(sampleNames(fs), function(sn) {
    process_masks(fs[[sn]], qc_channels = qc_channels, dna_channels = dna_channels, dna_cofactor = dna_cofactor)
  })
  names(mask_list) <- sampleNames(fs)

  margin_list <- setNames(lapply(mask_list, `[[`, "margin_keep"), sampleNames(fs))
  peacoqc_list <- setNames(lapply(mask_list, `[[`, "peacoqc_keep"), sampleNames(fs))
  dna_list <- setNames(lapply(mask_list, `[[`, "dna_keep"), sampleNames(fs))

  gs <- GatingSet(fs)

  dna_ch_exist <- intersect(dna_channels, colnames(gs))
  if (length(dna_ch_exist) > 0) {
    custom_arcsinh <- trans_new(
      name = "custom_arcsinh",
      transform = function(x) asinh(x / dna_cofactor),
      inverse = function(x) sinh(x) * dna_cofactor,
      breaks = extended_breaks(),
      format = scientific_format()
    )

    trans_list <- transformerList(
      dna_ch_exist,
      lapply(dna_ch_exist, function(x) custom_arcsinh)
    )
    gs <- transform(gs, trans_list)
  }

  gs_pop_add(gs, margin_list, name = "Margin_Clean", parent = "root")
  recompute(gs)

  gs_pop_add(gs, peacoqc_list, name = "PeacoQC_Clean", parent = "Margin_Clean")
  recompute(gs)

  gs_pop_add(gs, dna_list, name = "Singlets", parent = "PeacoQC_Clean")
  recompute(gs)

  gs
}

render_or_include_plot <- function(plot_path, plot_builder, width, height, dpi = 300) {
  should_rebuild <- force_rebuild_figures || !reuse_existing_figures || !file.exists(plot_path)

  if (should_rebuild) {
    plot_obj <- plot_builder()
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = plot_path,
      plot = plot_obj,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      dpi = dpi,
      units = "in",
      limitsize = FALSE
    )
  }

  knitr::include_graphics(plot_path)
}
```

# Build or Load Cached GatingSet

```{r gating-example}
gs <- if (dir.exists(gs_cache_path)) {
  load_gs(gs_cache_path)
} else {
  built_gs <- build_gs(
    flow_files = flow_files,
    qc_channels = chs,
    dna_channels = dna_ch,
    dna_cofactor = dna_cofactor
  )
  save_gs(built_gs, path = gs_cache_path, backend_opt = "copy")
  built_gs
}
```

# Counts

```{r gate-counts}
gate_counts <- as_tibble(gs_pop_get_count_fast(gs))
```

# DNA Peak Summary

```{r peak-summary}
peak_table <- lapply(sampleNames(gs), function(sn) {
  ff <- gh_pop_get_data(gs[[sn]], "Singlets")
  pk <- find_density_peaks(exprs(ff)[, dna_ch[1]])
  pk <- pk[order(pk$x), , drop = FALSE]

  tibble(
    sample = sn,
    peak_x = pk$x,
    peak_density = pk$y
  )
})

peak_table <- bind_rows(peak_table)
```

# Plots

```{r fsc-ssc-plots, dpi=300, fig.retina=2, fig.width=21, fig.height=14, out.extra='id="fsc_ssc_plot"'}
render_or_include_plot(
  plot_path = plot_paths$fsc_ssc,
  width = 21,
  height = 14,
  dpi = 300,
  plot_builder = function() {
    p_fsc_raw <- ggcyto(gs, subset = "root", aes(x = `FSC-A`, y = `SSC-A`)) +
      geom_hex(bins = 60) +
      labs(title = "FSC vs SSC (Raw)") +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 8))

    p_fsc_filtered <- ggcyto(gs, subset = "Singlets", aes(x = `FSC-A`, y = `SSC-A`)) +
      geom_hex(bins = 60) +
      labs(title = "FSC vs SSC (Filtered)") +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 8))

    as.ggplot(p_fsc_raw) + as.ggplot(p_fsc_filtered)
  }
)
```

```{r dna-scatter-plots, dpi=300, fig.retina=2, fig.width=21, fig.height=14, out.extra='id="dna_scatter_plot"'}
render_or_include_plot(
  plot_path = plot_paths$dna_scatter,
  width = 21,
  height = 14,
  dpi = 300,
  plot_builder = function() {
    p_dna_raw <- ggcyto(gs, subset = "root", aes(x = `450-Violet C-A`, y = `450-Violet C-H`)) +
      geom_hex(bins = 60) +
      labs(title = "DNA Scatter (Raw)") +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 8))

    p_dna_filtered <- ggcyto(gs, subset = "Singlets", aes(x = `450-Violet C-A`, y = `450-Violet C-H`)) +
      geom_hex(bins = 60) +
      labs(title = "DNA Scatter (Filtered Singlets)") +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 8))

    as.ggplot(p_dna_raw) + as.ggplot(p_dna_filtered)
  }
)
```

```{r dna-density-plots, dpi=300, fig.retina=2, fig.width=21, fig.height=14, out.extra='id="dna_density_plot"'}
render_or_include_plot(
  plot_path = plot_paths$dna_density,
  width = 21,
  height = 14,
  dpi = 300,
  plot_builder = function() {
    p_density_raw <- ggcyto(gs, subset = "root", aes(x = `450-Violet C-A`)) +
      geom_density(fill = "gray50", alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 0.5) +
      labs(title = "DNA Density (Raw)", y = "Density") +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 8))

    p_density_filtered <- ggcyto(gs, subset = "Singlets", aes(x = `450-Violet C-A`)) +
      geom_density(fill = "gray50", alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 0.5) +
      labs(title = "DNA Density (Filtered Singlets)", y = "Density") +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 8))

    as.ggplot(p_density_raw) + as.ggplot(p_density_filtered)
  }
)
```

```{r activate-zoom, results='asis'}
cat('
<script>
(function() {
  ["fsc_ssc_plot", "dna_scatter_plot", "dna_density_plot"].forEach(function(id) {
    var el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el || typeof panzoom === "undefined") return;
    panzoom(el, { maxZoom: 10, minZoom: 1 });
  });
})();
</script>
')
```
